title: Alpinestars SM5 Racer TC-2

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with EPS Liner

technical_analysis: The Alpinestars SM5 Racer TC-2 utilizes a high-modulus carbon fiber composite shell architecture designed to maximize impact absorption while minimizing overall mass. This construction method allows for strategic reinforcement in high-stress zones without adding unnecessary weight, resulting in a chassis that is both rigid and responsive. The internal structure features a multi-density EPS liner engineered to dissipate kinetic energy efficiently during frontal and side-impact scenarios, adhering strictly to the latest ECE 22.06 safety standards.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of track-focused protection with the Alpinestars SM5 Racer TC-2, a helmet crafted from aerospace-grade carbon fiber for uncompromised strength-to-weight ratios. Designed specifically for serious racers and enthusiasts who demand precision engineering, this full-face helmet offers an aerodynamic silhouette that slices through the air while maintaining superior acoustic comfort at high speeds.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Alpinestars SM5 Racer TC-2: a lightweight carbon fiber full-face motorcycle helmet featuring ECE 22.06 certification, advanced ventilation, and optimal fit for track performance.
